cityDNA.coreFantasy: A settled Romani caravan-capital where terrace granaries, caravanserais, high courts, training arenas, grain markets, wheel-emblem government, and the Lantern-Caravan Palace turn movement, law, food, performance, and belonging into civic order.
cityDNA.readerTakeaway: Velis Caravanor is permanent because it protects movement, not because it abandoned it.
cityDNA.civilizationThesis: Velis Caravanor is the architecture of rooted movement: a Romani caravan city that turns travel, witness, food, law, performance, and market trust into settled civic order.
cityDNA.visualIdentity: Painted plaster, brick, white civic stone, timber, bronze, colorful fabric, red awnings, blue lamps, terrace stone, caravan gates, wheel-emblem courts, lantern towers, high courts, training banners, and grain halls.
cityDNA.culturalIdentity: Romani-coded cosmopolitan civic culture where roads, witnesses, caravans, performance, food provision, and legal belonging are permanent institutions.
cityDNA.symbolicIdentity: Lantern-caravans, wheel emblems, terrace granaries, caravanserais, high courts, witness archives, training arenas, grain halls, and colorful awnings symbolize movement made lawful.

canonLocks: Velis Caravanor is a mature settled Romani caravan city, not a temporary camp.
The Wonder is Romani Lantern-Caravan Palace of Moving Roads.
The Beacon is Terrace Granary Beacon.
The Seat of Power is Caravan Wheel Emblems Sovereign Registry Court.
The five primary districts are Agricultural Terraces, Transit / Caravan / Rail, Judicial Quarter, Arena / Training, and Granary / Food Market.

Exact uploaded anchors include Agricultural Terraces Civic Hall, Terrace Granary Beacon, Hanging Gardens Monument, Seed Hall Nook, Transit / Caravan / Rail Civic Hall, Caravanserai, Woven Banners Monument, Waystation Hall Nook, Judicial Quarter Hall, High Court, Gold-Seal Monument, Witness Archive Nook, Arena / Training Civic Hall, Training Arena, Woven Banners Monument, Champion Gate Nook, Granary / Food Market Civic Hall, Grain Hall, Awning Monument, and Mill Court Nook.
provisionalCanon: Velis Caravanor's highest civic virtue is belonging in motion.
The city resolves settlement vs movement by making roads, caravans, and witnesses civic institutions.
rejectedReads: merchant city with no legal belonging
food systems as background market flavor
cautionFlags: Do not write VLC as a camp or stereotype; this is a sophisticated civic capital with legal institutions and provisioning systems.
Keep food and law visible together.

environment.environmentalLogic: Velis Caravanor turns roads, terraces, markets, and waystations into settled civic ground while keeping route memory visible in every district.

forms: Romani Lantern-Caravan Palace of Moving Roads
Caravan Wheel Emblems Sovereign Registry Court
skyline: Caravan Wheel Emblems Sovereign Registry Court as authority
lantern towers, caravanserai gates, rotunda towers, market awnings, high courts, arena banners, and grain halls

civilization.people: Citizens are Romani-coded, cosmopolitan, social, musical, trade-literate, legally aware, and protective of movement rights.
civilization.governance: Caravan Wheel Emblems Sovereign Registry Court governs movement rights, witness standing, route contracts, caravan legitimacy, food provision, residence, and civic belonging.
civilization.religion: Lantern-road symbolism, route blessings, witness oaths, caravan rites, and public festival light make belonging in motion sacred-adjacent.

streets.appearance: Colorful, warm, legal, and road-aware: lantern towers, wagon motifs, terrace stairs, caravan yards, court steps, arena banners, grain-market awnings, and settled-but-traveling civic identity.
streets.movement: Movement follows caravan gates, waystation routes, terrace stairs, witness archive approaches, high court plazas, arena entrances, and grain market paths.
streets.lighting: Warm lanterns and civic blue lamps turn roads into night-visible public memory.
streets.weatherEffects: Dust, heat, and clear air make shade, water points, and lantern routes practical civic infrastructure.
streets.dayCycle: Terrace work, caravan processing, witness filings, court sessions, arena practice, and grain markets dominate daytime.
streets.nightCycle: Lantern routes, music, hospitality, arena gatherings, and market food dominate night.

housing.wealthy: Registry, caravan-house, and patron homes with lantern balconies, painted courts, private guest rooms, and wheel-emblem stonework.
housing.middle: Shop-top homes, caravan-family apartments, guild rooms, and musician courtyards along route streets.
housing.poor: Guest-house rooms, road-edge dwellings, shared courtyards, and market-adjacent housing still integrated into public route life.

districts.name: Agricultural Terraces
districts.civicPurpose: Food security, seed continuity, rooted provision, and public signal legitimacy.
districts.visualIdentity: Agricultural Terraces Civic Hall, Terrace Granary Beacon, Hanging Gardens Monument, Seed Hall Nook.

districts.name: Transit / Caravan / Rail
districts.civicPurpose: Arrival, waystations, route contracts, and hospitality politics.
districts.visualIdentity: Transit / Caravan / Rail Civic Hall, Caravanserai, Woven Banners Monument, Waystation Hall Nook.

districts.name: Judicial Quarter
districts.civicPurpose: Testimony, law, belonging disputes, and witness pressure.
districts.visualIdentity: Judicial Quarter Hall, High Court, Gold-Seal Monument, Witness Archive Nook.

districts.name: Arena / Training
districts.civicPurpose: Performance, defense, bodily discipline, and public trial by skill.
districts.visualIdentity: Arena / Training Civic Hall, Training Arena, Woven Banners Monument, Champion Gate Nook.

districts.name: Granary / Food Market
districts.civicPurpose: Provisioning, milling, market exchange, and public abundance.
districts.visualIdentity: Granary / Food Market Civic Hall, Grain Hall, Awning Monument, Mill Court Nook.

wonder.name: Romani Lantern-Caravan Palace of Moving Roads
wonder.symbolicRole: Caravan memory, public light, route identity, and settled movement made civic.
wonder.visualRole: Wonder-scale lantern palace of roads, wheel emblems, painted plaster, colorful fabric, and public route terraces.
wonder.civicRole: Citywide symbol for belonging, route rights, hospitality, exile, public celebration, and civic light.
storyHooks: A lantern route proves someone belongs before the court admits it.

beacon.name: Terrace Granary Beacon
beacon.symbolicRole: Food security and rooted provision as public signal heart.
beacon.visualRole: Beacon among terrace granaries, seed halls, hanging gardens, and grain routes.
beacon.civicRole: Coordinates seed halls, caravanserais, courts, training grounds, and grain markets.
storyHooks: A Beacon change asks whether the city is rooted enough to keep moving.

seatOfPower.name: Caravan Wheel Emblems Sovereign Registry Court
seatOfPower.symbolicRole: Movement rights, witness standing, route contracts, and civic belonging made government.
seatOfPower.visualRole: Registry court with wheel emblems, painted stone, archives, legal stairs, and caravan approaches.
seatOfPower.civicRole: Disputes over roads, residence, caravan legitimacy, testimony, and belonging.
storyHooks: A witness archive proves movement was the original citizenship.

majorLandmarks.name: Caravanserai
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Caravan court with waystation nook, woven banners, road boards, and guest routes.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Arrival, lodging, route contracts, and hospitality politics.
storyHooks: A waystation record changes who is allowed to belong.

majorLandmarks.name: High Court
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Judicial hall with gold seal, witness archive, and public stairs.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Testimony, law, belonging disputes, and witness pressure.
storyHooks: The witness archive remembers a road the registry forgot.

majorLandmarks.name: Training Arena
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Arena with banners, champion gate, route-performance space, and public terraces.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Performance, defense, discipline, and public trial by skill.
storyHooks: A champion gate test is judged by grace under travel, not brute force.

majorLandmarks.name: Grain Hall
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Grain hall with awning monument, mill court, sacks, and market traffic.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Market provision, milling, hunger politics, and public abundance.
storyHooks: A grain tally proves hospitality has limits someone imposed.

districtDioramaGuidance: S1 must show Agricultural Terraces Civic Hall, Terrace Granary Beacon, Hanging Gardens Monument, and Seed Hall Nook.
S2 must show Transit / Caravan / Rail Civic Hall, Caravanserai, Woven Banners Monument, and Waystation Hall Nook.
S3 must show Judicial Quarter Hall, High Court, Gold-Seal Monument, and Witness Archive Nook.
S4 must show Arena / Training Civic Hall, Training Arena, Woven Banners Monument, and Champion Gate Nook.
S5 must show Granary / Food Market Civic Hall, Grain Hall, Awning Monument, and Mill Court Nook.
mapBackgroundGuidance: Keep Romani Lantern-Caravan Palace of Moving Roads, Terrace Granary Beacon, and Caravan Wheel Emblems Sovereign Registry Court legible together.
Use caravanserais, lantern towers, colorful awnings, wheel emblems, terrace granaries, high courts, training banners, and grain markets.
requiredVisualElements: Romani Lantern-Caravan Palace of Moving Roads
Caravan Wheel Emblems Sovereign Registry Court
